entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 26
entries.excerpt: “And there was a famine in the land… and Isaac went to Abimelech king of the Philistines in Gerar… And Isaac sowed in that land, and received the same year a hundredfold of barley: and the Lord blessed him. And the man waxed great, and went forward, and grew until he became very great” (Gen 26:1, 12–13). Then Abimelech feared that the sojourner would prevail over him.…
